observedMutationClass: Rules artifact markdown inventories could keep stale repo paths outside managed docs lint while rules:lint still reported success for owner docs.
acceptanceEvidenceClass: docs-lint tests, rules lint, and artifact scope validation; no gameplay, Unity runtime, or WebGL product acceptance evidence
rootCause: artifacts/rules/*.md files were not managed docs and had no stale repo path validation, so historical inventory files could keep removed docs/plans and ops paths as active-looking inline code references.
prevention: Added stale-rules-artifact-reference lint for rules artifact markdown inline repo paths and markdown targets, rerouted stale inventory paths to current owners, and preserved existing hard-fail coverage for active plan artifact owner shape drift, active plan concrete artifact owner collision, and progress evidence overload.
verification: Passed node --test tools/docs-lint/tests/docs-lint.test.mjs, npm run --silent rules:lint, and npm run --silent workflow:artifact-scope after adding rules artifact stale reference lint.
